case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. JONATHAN MILLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, JONATHAN DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-20-2019

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, JONATHAN $2,915.47 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,205.47, SEE SCANNED DOC
